mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as totalExpense, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as totalIncome, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as balance FROM record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = 0
AND DATE_FORMAT(record_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month}

SELECT c.id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, c.icon AS icon, COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS amount FROM record r INNER JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id AND c.del_flag = 0 AND c.type = 1 WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.del_flag = 0 AND r.type = 1 AND r.record_date >= #{startDate} AND r.record_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.icon ORDER BY amount DESC
